methods.name: bootstrap_protocol
methods.desc:
Creates the master $CORTEX utility token.
Only callable by the application creator.

methods.name: create_agent
methods.desc:
Creates a new Agent Token with immutable per-agent curve parameters.
Requires the CORTEX creation fee and enforces bounded launch settings.

methods.name: finalize_agent_config
methods.desc:
Materialize the pending agent config/supply into `c`/`s` boxes once
the created asset id is known to the caller for box references.

methods.name: get_agent_config
methods.desc: Return the packed per-agent launch configuration.

methods.name: get_agent_supply
methods.desc: Return the authoritative live curve supply for an agent.

methods.name: calculate_buy_price
methods.desc:
Calculates ALGO required to buy 'amount' of tokens along the curve.
Price = integral of (BASE_PRICE + SLOPE * supply) from S to S+amount.

methods.name: buy_tokens
methods.desc:
Buys tokens from the bonding curve by paying ALGO.
A buy fee (default 1%) is added on top of the curve price.

methods.name: calculate_sell_price
methods.desc:
Calculate ALGO returned for selling 'amount' tokens.
Integral of curve from (supply - amount) to supply, minus sell fee.

methods.name: sell_tokens
methods.desc:
Sells tokens back to the bonding curve for ALGO.
The seller must send an asset transfer of the agent token to the contract in the same group transaction.

methods.name: check_graduation
methods.desc:
Check if an agent token has met the graduation threshold.
Graduation means the total value locked in the bonding curve exceeds the configured threshold, signaling readiness for DEX listing.

methods.name: distribute_cortex
methods.desc:
Distribute CORTEX tokens from the factory escrow.
Only callable by the application creator. Used for testnet distribution and genesis airdrop.

methods.name: update_fee_parameters
methods.desc:
Update the default launch fee parameters used for future agent creation.
Existing agent configs remain immutable once created.

methods.name: update_creation_fee
methods.desc:
Update agent creation fee (in CORTEX micro-units).
Only callable by the application creator.

methods.name: update_graduation_threshold
methods.desc:
Update the default graduation threshold for future agent launches.
Existing agent configs remain immutable once created.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Finalize pending agent configuration before creating another agent
No pending config for this asset
Payment must be directed to the factory contract
Payment must exactly match required ALGO including fee
Token amount must exactly match sell amount
